assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7 contains: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matching the expected Role ('Rust backend service'), Serena Instance ('serena_backend'), and Path ('/home/user/trustify-backend') exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8 contains: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new row with trustify-ui and serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 contain all five Jira fields unchanged: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has a 'Preserved (no changes)' section listing trustify-backend row, all Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content as '**Preserved**'; and an 'Added' section listing the trustify-ui row as '**Added row**' and serena_ui limitation as '**Added**'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 lists serena_backend with Status: '**Already in Repository Registry** -- skipped' and serena_ui with Status: '**NEW -- not in Repository Registry**'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-31 preserve the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention (line 20), the serena_backend find_symbol example (lines 25-29), and the serena_backend limitation 'rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use' (line 33). The only addition is line 34: 'serena_ui: No known limitations'.
